name: Jenny Slate
bio: Jenny Slate is an American actress, stand-up comedian, and writer who was a cast member on Saturday Night Live and voices roles in Bobs Burgers and the Marcel the Shell shorts and film. Her first stand-up special, Stage Fright, blends live performance with home-video footage and family interviews.

timeline.ev: Joins Saturday Night Live for its 35th season
Begins voicing Tammy on Bobs Burgers
Stars in the film Obvious Child
Releases first stand-up special, Stage Fright, on Netflix

accolades: Co-creator of the Marcel the Shell with Shoes On franchise
Long-running voice role on Bobs Burgers

bits.t: Dont Wake My Mom Up or Shell Kill You
